title: bartlettina ehrenbergii
intro: Bartlettina ehrenbergii, also known as "Mexican mint" or "Bartlett's mint", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Bartlettina ehrenbergii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
